name: end-card
title: EndCard
description: Closing scene block: a hero CTA reveals with an optional accent underline, then a faint, staggered row of social handles or URLs fades in beneath it. Composes BlurReveal, Underline, and StaggerGroup so the motion fingerprint stays consistent with the rest of the catalog.
pickWhen: wrap a video on Onda's house outro — logo + tagline + CTA list, restraint over fanfare.
